title: Russia launches deadliest aerial attack in months, killing 18 in Ukraine
summary_full: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.
summary_public: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.
